message:
fix: restore 'Add more...' button placement in sidebar after SidebarShell refactor (#9785)

The SidebarShell extraction (PR #9740) moved the 'Add more...' button
to render after ALL nav sections. Previously it rendered between the
primary (dashboard list) and secondary nav sections. This made the
button unreachable — pushed below the secondary nav, cluster status,
and other panels.

Fix: render the button immediately after the primary section
(index 0) instead of after all sections, matching the original
Sidebar.tsx layout.

Fixes #9783

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
